GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "How to make your spring wardrobe more optimistic with colour", "Spring is the perfect time to refresh your wardrobe with statement pieces for the warmer days ahead — and nothing conveys a sense of optimism like colour. When wearing colour head to toe, don't be afraid to combine a range of tones in the same hue. This suit in striking cardamom is made from organically grown linen and is given a daytime edge when worn with a 'Modern Logo Tee' in dusty pink and pink-soled Tina Sneakers. Paired with the 'Darted Linen Pant', which feature a slim-fit cut and a kick flare, the overall look is perfectly grounded and a winning option for those of us who are always on the go. The great thing about investing in a suit is that you can give new life to each piece when wearing as separates. Take the 'Darted Linen Blazer' for instance: its tailored fit and longer line is perfect on top of shorts. Here, worn with 'Linen Darted Shorts' in cosmetic pink, the look offers another play on mixing blush tones. I think the ensemble feels modern and has an added freshness when matched with a streamlined white T-shirt and sneakers. Simply swap the sneakers for heels and add some statement jewellery for the evening or a dressier daytime occasion. The 'Blouson Sleeve Shirt' really is the hero of this look — the drop shoulder and beautiful sleeves accented by shirred cuffs add drama for daytime and work perfectly when matched with a simple, sleek pair of linen tailored shorts. I love how the 'Alice Slide' echoes the shirring on the cuffs, without looking overdone. A neutral handbag with a summery texture and practical sporty strap is always a good investment for spring. This look really embodies sophistication for spring and the flowing georgette fabric conveys a sense of romance when you move. The 'Gathered Blouse' features a gathered mock neck and its long blouson sleeves are the perfect complement to the 'Basque Detail Skirt'. Statement shirring on the skirt's waistband flatters the hips, and the mid-length is pure elegance. Wear yours with barely there accessories because this look is an absolute standout. This buttery hue is the ideal way to invite playful colour into your spring wardrobe and convey a sense of optimism. The top, an asymmetric tank, is a new shape for Country Road and one of my personal favorites, because it looks so sleek when paired with this eye-catching 'Shirred Waist Skirt' with delicate sunray pleats. Versatile and feminine, this blouse is part of Country Road's Exclusive Release range, a limited edition garment made from premium fabrications. Made from gorgeous textured seersucker, the statement sleeves add so much drama for every day. An added tip: it looks especially cool worn with denim as a daytime outfit."
